live-pak-ban.description: Solid defense. Shaheen bowls a yorker-length delivery, Shadman jams it out to mid-off.
FOUR! Classy shot. Overpitched on the pads, Shadman flicks it through mid-wicket. The outfield is fast, and it races away.
OUT! BOWLED! Absolute beauty from Shaheen! It swings in late, goes through the gate and rattles the stumps. Shanto is stunned.
Good length outside off, left alone by the batter.

live-mi-csk.description: SIX! Classic Dhoni! Bumrah misses the yorker by an inch, and Dhoni lofts it over long-on. The crowd is going wild!
